title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 18 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 18 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 18 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 2.94% today, the main contract closed at 771.5. The traders' willingness to ship is general. The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.
